ARCC.thesis: Long 10x 16P Apr26 + 5x 15P Jun26 at total debit 340 USD functions as cheap tail protection. MC 20k paths give median S_T 18.9441, P05 17.1861 and P(profit) 0.0006, confirming low premium cost while still capturing any break below 17.50 ahead of 15-Jun Q2 ex-date (0.48 dividend, high/bullish) and 28-May Fed window. Stable 10.14% yield and 0.194 realized vol keep skew attractive; position hedges credit-spread or rate-hike shocks without capping upside to 20.75 PT.

L1 TVL recovery post-Dencun plus Glamsterdam 78% gas cut outweigh PCE 3.5% print and ETH/BTC lag.
